mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
INSERT INTO tbl_comment (board_id, content, writer) VALUES (#{boardId}, #{content}, #{writer})
mapper.update: UPDATE tbl_comment SET deleted = TRUE, deleted_at = NOW() WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} AND deleted = FALSE
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_comment WHERE board_id = #{boardId}
